ddls:
CREATE TABLE "linguistic_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each linguistic property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the linguistic property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the linguistic property */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the linguistic property */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the source */,
  "author_list" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the source document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "participants_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linguistic property */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "norm" REAL /* Norm value */,
  "adjusted_r" REAL /* Adjusted R value */,
  "adjusted_r_squared" REAL /* Adjusted R-squared value */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value */,
  "r" REAL /* R value */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word or phrase being analyzed */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES linguistic_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each linguistic property
Unit of measure for the property
Unique identifier for each data source
Number of participants in the study
Unique identifier for each data point
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the data
ID of the data being accessed
Date when the data was accessed
ID of the user who performed the analysis
ID of the data being analyzed
Date when the analysis was performed
Location where the session was conducted
